name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Gucci Horsebit 1955 Shoulder Bag. The Gucci Horsebit 1955 series draws inspiration from archival designs, skillfully blending classic details from over sixty years ago with the essence of modern fashion, highlighting the unique charm of the horsebit. The design pattern is inspired by the brand's equestrian roots, composed of two elements: a double ring and a long strip, which has become one of the brand's highly recognizable iconic elements. Beige/Walnut GG Supreme canvas, white leather trim, gold-tone hardware, front horsebit detail, top handle, metal chain strap.
